description: Visual Studio 2022 is open with the `HardwareDrivers.sln` solution loaded, containing a .NET 8 class library `SensorComm` and a unit test project `SensorComm.Tests`. Your task is to implement a serial communication driver for a Lidar sensor in `LidarLiteDriver.cs`. Install the `System.IO.Ports` package into the `SensorComm` project. Implement the `Connect(string portName)` method to initialize and open a `SerialPort` using 115200 Baud Rate, No Parity, 8 Data Bits, and 1 Stop Bit. Implement `Disconnect()` to close and dispose of the port. Implement `ParseDistance(string rawData)` to extract and return the numeric value as a `double` from the sensor's data stream format `"DIST: <value> mm"` (e.g., `"DIST: 1240.5 mm\r\n"`). Ensure all tests in `LidarLiteDriverTests` pass.
